description: Phased rollout configuration for auto-PR drafting in the agent-feedback pipeline. Consumed by the process_feedback skill. Phase transitions require explicit human action — no time-based promotion.

1.name: issue_only
1.notes: Phase 1 MVP: classifier runs, cron updates status, every actionable item becomes a GitHub issue. No auto-PR drafting. prefer_human_draft=true is always honored.

2.name: draft_only_narrow
2.notes: Phase 2 entry gate: ≥10 resolved feedback items AND ≥90% classifier/Mark classification agreement over the last 20 triaged items.

3.name: broadened_scope
3.notes: Phase 3 entry gate: ≥80% acceptance rate on the last 20 auto-PR drafts.

kill_switch.description: When set to 0 or false, auto-PR drafting is disabled regardless of phase. The process_feedback skill MUST check this before drafting a PR.

accuracy_floor.description: If classifier/Mark agreement drops below 0.7 over the last 20 triaged items for two consecutive weekly reports, auto-degrade to human-triage-only mode (phase 1) until the operator re-enables. Surfaced in `neotoma triage --health`.
